discovery.meta_title: Discovery Meeting Request — eCyPro Premium Consulting
discovery.meta_description: Free 30-minute discovery call. Initial assessment on M&A, ESG, strategic transformation, or family business governance.
discovery.page_subtitle: Fill in the form — reply within 48 hours. No commitment, 30-minute strategic assessment call.
discovery.placeholder_description: What are you working on right now? Share your M&A, ESG, digital transformation, or strategic priorities.
discovery.kvkk_consent_text: I have read the personal data disclosure notice and consent to the processing of my personal data. My data will be used solely for the purpose of organising the discovery meeting and retained for 3 years under ROPA SAT-01.
discovery.success_body: We'll get back to you within 48 hours. For urgent matters, you can reach us via WhatsApp.
discovery.error_text: A temporary issue occurred. We'll get back to you within 48 hours. For urgent matters:
discovery.footer_kvkk: Your personal data is processed under Turkish Personal Data Protection Law (KVKK No. 6698). Used solely for discovery meeting organisation; not shared with third parties.
